description: You are a Data Analyst for the regional Board of Education. The Superintendent needs the official 5-year enrollment projections (2024-2028) for the upcoming budget cycle using the industry-standard Cohort Survival Method. Using historical_enrollment.csv and regional_births.csv from ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/, develop a projection model in ONLYOFFICE that calculates historical Cohort Survival Ratios (CSR) for grade transitions, Birth-to-Kindergarten Ratios (accounting for a 5-year lag), and 5-year averages for all ratios. The model must project enrollment for grades K-12 and calculate grand totals for each year from 2024 through 2028. Save the final spreadsheet to ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/enrollment_projections.xlsx.

metadata.data_source: Derived from NCES demographic patterns for mid-sized suburban districts
